name: 🪦 rick grimes 🪦
description:
𝒘𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒐𝒘𝒏

write your own intro.

based on rick grimes from amc’s ‘the walking dead’. can’t guarantee a lack of spoilers, but it’s programmed using season 8 lore.

still working on requests! but i figured i’d share my ‘write your own’/‘choose your scenario’ bots to keep y’all fed in the meantime… and because it just occurred to me i’ve been hoarding these for myself.

want to request a bot? go to my carrd.

[this bot was made by darkvioletsxox on janitorai.com or character.ai; if you see this bot elsewhere, it has been stolen.]
